name: Maharani Bridal Haar
description: Temple-inspired 22K bridal necklace adorned with rubies and south sea pearls.
craftsmanship: Handcrafted by 4th-generation karigars in Hyderabad. Features traditional nakshi work, detailed filigree borders, and hand-selected natural Burmese rubies.

name: Royal Polki Choker
description: Uncut polki necklace with fine emerald beads and gold drop accents.
craftsmanship: Created using the classic Jadau setting technique. Embellished with raw, uncut diamonds (Polki) framed with delicate gold wire and premium Zambian emeralds.

name: Solitaire Brilliance Ring
description: 1.2ct VVS solitaire on a sleek 18K platinum and yellow gold knife-edge band.
craftsmanship: Precision-set GIA-certified round brilliant cut diamond on a hand-polished multi-metal band with a six-prong platinum crown for maximum light fire.

name: Riviera Tennis Bracelet
description: Channel-set round brilliant diamonds along a flexible 18K white gold link.
craftsmanship: Individually linked settings aligned perfectly by hand. Total weight of 4.5 carats of ethically sourced round brilliant diamonds of VS+ clarity.

name: Empress Chandelier Drops
description: Pear-cut diamonds suspended on filigree 18K gold chandelier drops.
craftsmanship: Delicate openwork filigree drops incorporating micro-pave diamonds with suspended drops designed to sway and catch candlelight.

name: Aurelia Diamond Pendant
description: Cushion-cut central diamond framed in a halo of 18K rose gold.
craftsmanship: Claw-set cushion cut solitaire surrounded by a pave-set diamond halo, hung on an ultra-fine 18K rose gold Italian link chain.

name: Majestic Peacock Jhumkas
description: Exquisite 22K gold jhumkas featuring detailed peacock carvings and seed pearl fringes.
craftsmanship: Carved using traditional embossing (Chitai work). Accented with fine red enamel work and finished with cascades of natural Basra seed pearls.

name: Temple Heritage Haram
description: Long 22K gold heritage haram necklace depicting goddess Lakshmi with floral medallions.
craftsmanship: Hand-hammered repoussé work in pure 22K gold. Takes over 80 hours of craftsmanship to form the detailed relief work, accented by cabochon rubies.

name: Aura Gold Bangle Set
description: Pair of antique-finished 22K gold kadas with detailed geometric engraving.
craftsmanship: Hand-engraved vintage-finished gold bangles with screw clasps. Created with dense gold sheeting, ensuring heavy heirloom build quality.

name: Shahi Kundan Set
description: Ornate kundan necklace with matching drop earrings, backed by fine meenakari work.
craftsmanship: Pure 24K gold foil (Kundan) setting bordering glass stones, backed by intricate red and green meenakari (enameling) depicting Royal Mughal gardens.

name: Nizam Gemstone Choker
description: Magnificent multi-layered necklace of Zambian emerald beads and certified uncut diamonds.
craftsmanship: Inspired by the treasures of the Deccan. Threaded with high-luster matched emerald beads and structured with 22K gold bars encrusted with uncut diamonds.

name: Dewdrop Diamond Studs
description: Classic three-stone diamond cluster studs shaped like morning dewdrops.
craftsmanship: Claw-set round and pear cut diamonds totaling 0.6 carats, mounted in hypoallergenic 18K white gold alloy with secure screw backings.

name: Elegant Gold Choker
description: Modern collar choker crafted in brushed and polished 22K yellow gold.
craftsmanship: Features alternating links of high-polish and sand-blasted matte gold, forming a flexible ribbon-like collar that contours comfortably around the neck.

name: Floral Diamond Bangle
description: Delicate diamond bangle in 18K white gold with repeating jasmine motifs.
craftsmanship: Hand-set with alternating brilliant-cut and baguette-cut diamonds to simulate flower petals and stems, utilizing a hidden click-lock safety clasp.

name: Bridal Matha Patti
description: Traditional forehead ornament in 22K gold plated silver with kundan and rubies.
craftsmanship: Traditional Gota-style gold-foil work accented with red glass rubies and finished with hanging pearl beads along the temple line.

name: Antique Lakshmi Kasu
description: A classic Kasulaperu coin necklace featuring repetitive coins of Goddess Lakshmi.
craftsmanship: Authentic temple reproduction. Each Lakshmi coin is individually stamped, antiqued with ash-finish, and linked to a heavy gold cord.

name: Princess Engagement Ring
description: Stunning 1.5ct princess cut diamond on a pave-set white gold diamond band.
craftsmanship: Features a central GIA princess-cut stone with a micro-pave band containing 24 round diamonds for extra brilliance.

name: Emerald Drop Earrings
description: High-end drop earrings combining emerald cut green emeralds and teardrop diamonds.
craftsmanship: 18K white gold settings suspending matched Colombian emeralds below brilliant marquise-cut diamond posts.

name: Traditional Polki Nath
description: Elegant bridal nose ring set with polki diamonds and ruby beads.
craftsmanship: Authentic Jadau craftsman piece using thin 24K gold foils to secure uncut diamonds, strung on an ultra-light gold side chain.

name: Heritage Bridal Vanki
description: V-shaped traditional armlet with peacock motifs, rubies, and emeralds.
craftsmanship: Flexible 22K gold armlet core padded with silk thread backing, decorated with intricate repousse peafowls set with cabochon gemstones.
